name_en: Top-tier original stock [Exclusive real shot M48865 White flower charm / Mini] M21416 This Capucines Mini handbag is made from soft Taurillon calfskin, featuring a removable Monogram floral leather charm for a fresh seasonal look. The top handle and detachable, adjustable shoulder strap allow for versatile carrying: hand-held, elbow-carry, shoulder, or crossbody. size:21x14x8cm
